messages.author: swarm
messages.text: This ticket needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve" to approve it.

messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: Commits on the shared master checkout must carry the caller's staged content (race)
What it solves: THE BUG (silent staged-content loss on a shared checkout): a writer stages an
edit to a YAML on `main` (the coordinator's own live master checkout, shared
with NO isolation) and commits; `git show <new-sha>:<path>` afterward reads the
PRE-edit content — the staged change was dropped from the very c…
How it works: A commit carries the caller's own staged content for its path even when an unrelated commit lands in the stage-to-commit window
